init.description: Set the command mode for each garage door. Direct: dedicated open, close and stop commands. Toggle: open and close stop the door if it is moving in the opposite direction.

user.title: Connect to Maveo
user.description: This integration communicates with the Maveo cloud (Marantec). An internet connection and a Maveo account are required at all times.

data_description.region: EU for Europe, US for North America

create_guest.name: Create guest key
create_guest.description: Create a time-limited guest key for a device and display its QR code.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: Numeric device ID from the devices list.

ttl_hours.name: Validity (hours)
ttl_hours.description: How long the guest key is valid.

admin.name: Admin access
admin.description: If true, the guest has full remote access (no geofence).

remove_guest.name: Remove guest key
remove_guest.description: Revoke a guest key from a device.

user_id.name: Guest user ID
user_id.description: UUID of the guest user to remove.
